buggy_code:
for i in range(1, len(items)):
    process(items[i])
task: Process every element in the list starting from index 0
error_location: line 1: range starts at 1, skipping index 0
clarification_query: What range arguments include index 0 through the last element?
explanation: range(1, len(items)) starts at index 1, skipping the first element. range(len(items)) starts at 0.
